1: 2 I do not worship what you worship.
3 Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.
4 Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.
5 Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.
6 For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."
1_es: 2 Yo no sirvo lo que vosotros servís,
3 Y vosotros no servís lo que yo sirvo.
4 Yo no sirvo lo que vosotros habéis servido
5 Y vosotros no servís lo que yo sirvo.
6 Vosotros tenéis vuestra religión y yo la mía».
